stimulus: Beatrice Wood and Henrietta Reiss were among the 200 women artists who participated in the 1917 Society of Independent Artists exhibition, a landmark New York City show that welcomed any artist willing to pay a small fee. Though dismissed at the time, an unsigned porcelain urinal submitted by Marcel Duchamp—one of several works that drew confused reactions from visitors—______blank the modernist canon more than a century later.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb "has entered" agrees in number with the singular subject "an unsigned porcelain urinal."

Choice A is incorrect because the plural verb "were entering" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject. Choice C is incorrect because the plural verb "have entered" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject. Choice D is incorrect because the plural verb "enter" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject.
